subject: Four operator directives received this turn — verified current state, routing recommendations
body:
Operator stacked 4 directives mid-turn (15:34-15:42Z), all logged to operator-utterances.jsonl. test-modes-verify lane is verification-only and won't implement; here's the verified current state + the lane each should route to:

=== DIRECTIVE 1 (15:40:56Z) — multi-account / round-robin / no downtime ===
VERIFIED STATE: 95% infrastructure already in place.
  - claude-accounts.json v2 has 4-slot model (operator | leo | slot3 | slot4) with rotation_strategy='round-robin' declared
  - Sinister Custodian shipped launcher full-power fallback this same turn at start-sinister-session.ps1:1129-1153
  - Get-NextAvailableAccount exists at start-sinister-session.ps1:1142
  - operator account: 8 current sessions, max=999, rate_limited_until_utc=null, successful_spawns_today=13
GAP: slots leo/slot3/slot4 are enabled:false because credentials.{leo,slot3,slot4}.json don't exist at C:\Users\Zonia\.claude\. That's an OPERATOR action — agents can't run claude login on operator's behalf.
ROUTE TO: Sinister Custodian (already active in this file) for any selection-policy improvements; OPERATOR-ACTION-QUEUE row for 'claude login' the 3 unconfigured slots.

=== DIRECTIVE 2 (15:40:57Z) — broadcast system + hot memory/tool updates, never stop agents ===
VERIFIED STATE: fleet-update channel doctrine exists (CLAUDE.md cold-start step 11) but jsonl file _shared-memory/fleet-updates.jsonl does NOT exist on disk yet (Bash `ls` returned exit 2 / no file).
GAP A: bootstrap the jsonl + verify automations/fleet-update.ps1 -Action List works.
GAP B: hot-reload mechanism for MCP server / memory updates — currently agents must restart to pick up new ~/.claude.json MCPs (operator queue acknowledges this).
ROUTE TO: Sanctum master lane — owns broadcast channel + cold-start step 11.

=== DIRECTIVE 3 (15:40:57Z) — 'prepare for the sinister os' ===
VERIFIED STATE: test-os lane is at turn 4 of M1 hardening (compose.hardened.yml + HARDENING.md verified parse-clean + merge-tested, commit 532f4e9 on agent/sinister-os/m1-hardening-2026-05-24). 'Prepare' is too vague to act on without clarification.
ROUTE TO: sinister-os lane via _shared-memory/inbox/sinister-os/ + asking operator what 'prepare' specifically means.

=== DIRECTIVE 4 (15:42:25Z) — mass GitHub-links/ideas intake + auto-review for cross-project reuse ===
VERIFIED STATE: automations/github-prior-art.ps1 exists (cold-start step 9) for per-feature lookup. Forever-improve doctrine (step 10) is the review framework. No INTAKE inbox exists for mass operator-dumped ideas/links yet.
GAP: a 'inbox/operator-ideas.jsonl' or similar where operator dumps URLs/snippets, plus a daily-run reviewer that classifies each (relevant lane? extract-worthy? reject?). Composes with curator bot (cost-bounded Haiku scout per bot-fleet-quick-reference.md).
ROUTE TO: Sanctum master lane (intake system design); curator bot lane (review-pass implementation).

=== test-modes-verify deliverables this turn (verified) ===
  - _shared-memory/PROGRESS/test-modes-verify.md (NEW): 3 churn reproducers (transient P8 / sinister-chatbot status-code pollution / live slug-collision)
  - _shared-memory/heartbeats/test-modes-verify.json (NEW): turn 10 heartbeat
  - _shared-memory/operator-utterances.jsonl: 4 new rows logged
  - _shared-memory/resume-points/Sinister Sanctum/2026-05-24T154104Z.json: resume-point written manually (resume-point-write.ps1 hung silently in background, twice)

=== Slug collision flag ===
A persona calling itself 'Sinister Custodian' has actively claimed slug 'test-modes' (clobbered both heartbeat + PROGRESS files within minutes). Per lane-discipline I ceded to test-modes-verify. Recommend renaming Custodian to slug 'custodian' (free) to free 'test-modes' for the original lane.
action_required: Sanctum lane to assign directives 1/2/4 to right lanes + drop OPERATOR-ACTION-QUEUE rows where operator action is needed (slot3/slot4 credentials, sinister-os scope clarification)
